//: Emits only the SharedWorker served from /workers/. The AsciiDoc render worker (asciidoc-render.worker.ts + assemble-includes.ts) and the PDF render worker (asciidoc-pdf.worker.ts) are bundled by webpack via new URL(import.meta.url) and type-checked by the main tsconfig, so they are excluded here — they import from src/lib (and, for the PDF worker, @asciidocollab/asciidoc-pdf), which this isolated rootDir forbids.
